channel.title: Awesome Technical Accounting
channel.description: A curated list of high-quality resources for technical accounting and financial reporting under US GAAP and IFRS.

item.title: FASB Accounting Standards Codification
item.category: Standards & Authoritative Sources
item.description: The single source of authoritative US GAAP, searchable online (free Basic View).

item.title: Financial Accounting Standards Board (FASB)
item.category: Standards & Authoritative Sources
item.description: Standard setter for US GAAP; publishes Accounting Standards Updates, exposure drafts, and project updates.

item.title: IFRS Foundation (IASB)
item.category: Standards & Authoritative Sources
item.description: Issuer of IFRS Accounting Standards used in 140+ jurisdictions, with a free register of issued standards.

item.title: SEC EDGAR Full-Text Search
item.category: Standards & Authoritative Sources
item.description: Full-text search across public company filings; the primary corpus for disclosure research and benchmarking.

item.title: SEC Financial Reporting Manual
item.category: Standards & Authoritative Sources
item.description: Division of Corporation Finance staff guidance on SEC financial statement requirements.

item.title: SEC Staff Accounting Bulletins
item.category: Standards & Authoritative Sources
item.description: SEC staff interpretations on accounting and disclosure (e.g., materiality and revenue).

item.title: AICPA & CIMA
item.category: Standards & Authoritative Sources
item.description: Audit and accounting guides, Technical Questions and Answers, and the Center for Plain English Accounting.

item.title: BDO Accounting Standards & Reporting Matters
item.category: Firm Reference Libraries
item.description: Blueprints, bulletins, and newsletters on US GAAP and SEC developments.

item.title: Deloitte Accounting Research Tool (DART)
item.category: Firm Reference Libraries
item.description: Deloitte's Roadmap series and manuals, much of it free with registration.

item.title: Deloitte IAS Plus
item.category: Firm Reference Libraries
item.description: Free global IFRS and US GAAP news, standards summaries, and resources.

item.title: EY AccountingLink
item.category: Firm Reference Libraries
item.description: EY's Financial Reporting Developments publications, Technical Line guidance, and quarterly briefs.

item.title: Grant Thornton Insights
item.category: Firm Reference Libraries
item.description: Accounting and reporting bulletins, New Developments Summaries, and quarterly updates.

item.title: KPMG Financial Reporting View
item.category: Firm Reference Libraries
item.description: KPMG's hub of handbooks, hot topics, and CPE-eligible insights on US GAAP, IFRS, and SEC reporting.

item.title: PwC Viewpoint
item.category: Firm Reference Libraries
item.description: PwC's accounting and reporting guides, In briefs, and In depths (free registration).

item.title: RSM Financial Reporting Resource Center
item.category: Firm Reference Libraries
item.description: Bi-weekly Financial Reporting Insights and topic-organized accounting guidance.

item.title: Revenue recognition
item.category: Big Four Accounting & Reporting Guides / Deloitte
item.description: Roadmap to applying ASC 606.

item.title: Accounting Accidentally
item.category: Newsletters & Blogs
item.description: Ken Boyd, author of several "For Dummies" accounting titles, explains core accounting concepts and the CPA exam for students and professionals.

item.title: Deep Quarry
item.category: Newsletters & Blogs
item.description: Olga Usvyatsky uses data to uncover trends in financial disclosure and reporting, from SEC comment letters to restatement red flags.

item.title: The Dig
item.category: Newsletters & Blogs
item.description: Investigative journalist Francine McKenna digs into accounting, auditing, and governance issues at public and pre-IPO companies.

item.title: FinAcco Insights
item.category: Newsletters & Blogs
item.description: Technical accounting articles on revenue, leases, financial instruments, crypto, and valuation from a specialist advisory firm.

item.title: GAAPSavvy
item.category: Newsletters & Blogs
item.description: Angela Liu's field-notes newsletter on what is actually happening on the ground in corporate accounting, including revenue recognition and the accounting/AI intersection.

item.title: TechAccountingPro
item.category: Newsletters & Blogs
item.description: Practical US GAAP research and solutions with a focus on digital-asset and crypto accounting, presentation, and audit readiness.

item.title: Ambition, Aligned
item.category: Profession, Practice & Careers
item.description: Devon Coombs (CPA, formerly Deloitte and Google Cloud) on AI strategy, finance leadership, and purpose-driven careers for finance professionals.

item.title: Jason Staats
item.category: Profession, Practice & Careers
item.description: CPA Jason Staats on running modern accounting firms, covering practice management, accounting technology, and AI tooling.
